## Skill name

`maplibre-xxx-patterns` (or similar)

## Description

Brief one-line description of what this skill would cover.

## Use cases

When would an AI assistant apply this skill? (e.g. "Use when integrating MapLibre with React")

## Content outline

- [ ] Section 1
- [ ] Section 2
- [ ] Key examples or patterns to include

## References

- [MapLibre docs](https://maplibre.org/maplibre-gl-js/docs/)
- Other relevant docs or examples

## Notes

Any additional context, dependencies on other skills, or open questions.
